custom.condition: The NDA is part of an M&A, employment, or investment transaction.
custom.reason: The confidentiality terms require transaction-specific specialist review rather than stand-alone commercial NDA triage.

custom.condition: The document contains standstill, exclusivity, non-solicitation, non-competition, IP assignment, license, right-of-first-refusal, most-favored-nation, or similarly broader obligations.
custom.reason: The document may be more than an NDA and cannot be routed for signature on confidentiality review alone.

execution_modes.purpose: Confirm the document is a stand-alone commercial NDA, identify missing inputs, scan for obligations beyond confidentiality, and return only the preliminary escalation posture.
Produce the standard NDA triage rating, key-term summary, risk table, negotiation priorities, and attorney-verification items.
Run the complete clause-category, red-flag, market-benchmark, negotiability, internal-consistency, and stakeholder-summary workflow with all applicable reference modules.

input_schema.label: Client role
input_schema.description: The client's role under the NDA.

input_schema.label: Transaction context
input_schema.description: The transaction setting used to determine whether stand-alone NDA triage is appropriate.

output_schema.label: Structured risk summary
output_schema.description: Material NDA provisions, exact section evidence, client risk, severity, preferred position, fallback position, and attorney action.

output_schema.label: Prioritized redline points for attorney review
output_schema.description: High, medium, and low negotiation points with preferred and fallback positions and no final clause language unless attorney-directed.

fields.description: The provision or clause category supporting the issue.
The client role and playbook position used in the analysis.

modules.load_when: standard or deep-review mode when negotiation prioritization is requested
deep-review mode or when market practice is requested
a populated and attorney-approved contracts profile is available
